personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Capacity Planning & AI-Driven Infrastructure Optimization
personal.address: Murphy, TX (Plano area) / 424 Oriole Dr., Murphy, TX 75094

summary: Senior Data Engineer with over 20 years of enterprise experience in designing and building scalable, high-performance data pipelines and ETL workflows. Proficient in Python programming, I specialize in data ingestion, transformation, and management, ensuring data quality and operational reliability for large-scale environments. My expertise includes processing terabytes of data using AWS serverless architectures and PySpark for data operations. I have a proven track record in collaborating with business partners to operationalize data pipelines and enhance data storage frameworks. I am passionate about contributing to Randstad Digital’s mission of delivering robust data solutions. My background aligns with driving data processing innovations to support critical business needs like trading activities at Two Sigma.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine

Developed an interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time capacity insights and 'High Trust' utilization scores. Created a modern agentic pipeline for banking-scale telemetry processing. Features comprehensive documentation, API guides, and performance benchmarks.
